title: rouya polygama
intro: Rouya polygama is a type of plant native to Africa, commonly known as the 'African tea'. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Rouya polygama is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in wound healing. The plant is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for consumption.
